description: This Fix8 Kombucha offers a refreshing and fruity experience, blending the sweet notes of strawberry with aromatic basil. Slow-brewed and enriched with live cultures, it supports gut health and provides 25% of your daily recommended Vitamin C, making it a delicious and beneficial sparkling beverage.
ingredients: Filtered water; Kombucha cultures; Sencha green tea; sugar; natural flavouring; 2% strawberry juice from concentrate; purple carrot concentrate; natural basil flavouring; Vitamin C; lactic acid bacillus Produced in a manufactuer that is nut; soy and dairy free.

targetUsers.motivation: Seeking flavorful, low-alcohol (or non-alcoholic) drinks that provide probiotics and added vitamin benefits
Purchase for live cultures and perceived digestive benefits, plus convenient ready-to-drink format
Looking for a grab-and-go, flavorful beverage that feels healthier than standard soft drinks

description: UNWIND — a lightly sparkling adaptogenic drink infused with Reishi mushroom and Ashwagandha to ease the mind and promote relaxation. Blends lemon and lavender with prickly pear juice, turmeric, burdock root and artichoke leaf. Enriched with magnesium, L-tryptophan and vitamin B12. 100% natural, only 13 kcal per 100ml.
ingredients: Sparkling Water, Grape Juice from Concentrate, Prickly Pear Juice, Reishi Mushroom, Turmeric, Ashwagandha, Burdock Root, Artichoke Leaf, Citric Acid, Magnesium Citrate, Natural Flavourings (Lemon & Lavender), L-Tryptophan, Ascorbic Acid, Steviol Glycosides, Vitamin B12 (Cyanocobalamin)

targetUsers.motivation: Ashwagandha and Reishi have growing mainstream recognition for stress/anxiety relief — a drink format makes it easy and pleasant
L-tryptophan and magnesium are recognised sleep-support ingredients — combined with adaptogens in a bedtime drink
Lavender-lemon flavour profile and calming function serves as an evening 'treat' drink without alcohol

description: A sparkling CBD-infused drink combining juicy peach with warming ginger and botanical extracts. Cold-pressed CBD preserves the full spectrum of cannabinoids for maximum efficacy. Contains 5mg active CBD per 250ml can, real fruit juice and calming botanicals including chamomile, green tea and lemon balm.
ingredients: Water, Fruit Juices from Concentrate 17% (Grape, Peach 8%), Flavour Enhancer (Erythritol), Sweetener (Steviol Glycosides from Stevia), Botanical Extracts (Ginger, Chamomile, Green Tea, Lemon Balm, Turmeric), Citric Acid, Natural Flavour, Cold-Pressed CBD (5mg/250ml)

targetUsers.motivation: Want a convenient, tasty way to unwind without alcohol or pharmaceutical sleep aids
Low-dose entry point (5mg) in a familiar soft drink format lowers the barrier to trying CBD
Seeking sophisticated non-alcoholic alternatives that offer a functional benefit beyond hydration
